title: Przesłuchanie on-line w postępowaniu administracyjnym
author: Korzeniowska-Polak Agnieszka
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article deals with the issue of questioning a witness and hearing a party in an electronic form during a pandemic. Since a procedural step requiring, in accordance with the provisions of personal law, appearance is undoubtedly the hearing of a witness, is it possible for the witness to apply for an on-line hearing? The article presents a legal analysis of Polish solutions introduced by the special act.
